weeklyGoals: Follow up on applications after 3-5 business days
paceNote: These numbers are a floor to aim for, not a pass/fail test. A slower week (fewer applications, one mock interview instead of two) still counts as real progress — the goal is to keep moving, not to hit every number every single week.

days1to2.title: Prepare
items: Update resume headline to CompTIA A+ Certified Technical Support Candidate
Add remote customer-service bullets rewritten as support experience
Set the LinkedIn headline: CompTIA A+ Certified | Per Scholas Graduate | Remote Customer Service | Entry-Level IT Support
Set job alerts using the search links

days3to7.title: Apply hard
breakdown: 3 local/hybrid help desk or desktop support roles

days8to14.title: Follow up and network
items: Message Per Scholas alumni and career staff
Ask recruiters about contract-to-hire help desk roles
Follow up on applications after 3-5 business days
